# incapsula_abp_proof_of_work_configuration

Looks up an ABP Proof Of Work Configuration in an account by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "incapsula_abp_proof_of_work_configuration" "pow1_lookup" {
  account_id = var.account_id
  name       = incapsula_abp_proof_of_work_configuration.pow1.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String) ABP account UUID to search within.
- `name` (String) Name of the Proof Of Work Configuration to look up.

### Read-Only

- `algorithm` (String) Proof Of Work algorithm.
- `created_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp at which the Proof Of Work Configuration was created.
- `difficulty` (Number) Number of credits a client gets for completing a proof-of-work challenge.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `modified_at` (String) RFC3339 timestamp at which the Proof Of Work Configuration was last modified.
